OBJECT IDENTIFIER

RISHIK MADURI

SAP Certified Associate | Back-End Developer – ABAP Cloud
AVAILABLE FOR OPPORTUNITIES HYDERABAD, INDIA
🛡️
U.S. CITIZEN — Legally authorized to work in both **India** and **USA** immediately without sponsorship (No visa sponsorship required).

* Summary of Capabilities

SAP Certified ABAP Cloud Developer with hands-on expertise building scalable enterprise applications. Specializing in SAP RESTful Application Programming (RAP), Core Data Services (CDS View Entities), OData Services v4, SAP Fiori, and SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). Focused on clean, decoupled back-end code and semantic database modeling.

CGPA 8.5 B.S. Computer Science
SAP Certs 1 Verified ABAP Cloud
Deployments 2 Active RAP Projects

* Technical Skills Inventory

SAP CORE
SAP ABAP Cloud SAP RAP (Restful ABAP) CDS View Entities Behavior Definitions OData v4 Services Object-Oriented ABAP Open SQL
PLATFORM & UX
SAP BTP Cloud SAP S/4HANA SAP Fiori UI5 HANA DB Layer ABAP RAP Determinations ABAP RAP Validations
LANGUAGES & UTILITIES
ABAP
⚙ LIVE SAP RAP TRANSACTION ENGINE SIMULATION IDLE
Query Sandbox ABAP SQL
* Define standard ABAP CDS view projection *
define root view entity ZI_STUDENT
  as select from zstudent
{
  key student_id,
      student_name,
      department,
      credits_earned,
      cgpa
}
UI Fiori Client
↓
API OData Service
↓
CTRL Behavior Def
↓
BO RAP Biz Object
↓
DATA CDS View Entity
↓
DB SAP HANA DB

DATASET SIZE: -- Rows

---
title: Why Work With Rishik?
role: SAP Certified ABAP Cloud Developer
status: Available Immediately
---

# WHY WORK WITH RISHIK?

I am not just looking for a job — I am looking for challenging problems worth solving.

As a SAP Certified ABAP Cloud Developer, I am passionate about building scalable solutions, understanding business processes, and transforming complex requirements into efficient systems.

What drives me is curiosity, continuous learning, and the satisfaction of solving real-world problems that create measurable impact.

## WHAT I BRING

  • ✓ Strong problem-solving mindset
  • ✓ Ability to quickly learn new technologies and domains
  • ✓ Enterprise application development experience using SAP RAP and SAP BTP
  • ✓ Passion for understanding both business and technical challenges
  • ✓ Analytical thinking and structured decision making
  • ✓ Focus on delivering practical, scalable solutions
  • ✓ Adaptability across different industries and technologies
  • ✓ Strong ownership and accountability
  • ✓ Continuous learner with a growth mindset
  • ✓ Ability to bridge the gap between business requirements and technical implementation

## AREAS OF INTEREST

I am actively open to opportunities in:

  • • SAP ABAP Development
  • • SAP RAP Development
  • • SAP BTP Development
  • • SAP Technical Consulting
  • • Business Analysis
  • • Data Analysis
  • • Product Analysis
  • • Technology Consulting
  • • Enterprise Application Development
  • • Cloud Technologies
  • • Digital Transformation Projects
  • • Any highly problem-solving and impact-driven role where analytical thinking, innovation, and continuous learning are valued.

## MY APPROACH

When faced with a problem, I don't stop at finding an answer. I focus on understanding:

  • * Why the problem exists
  • * What business value is affected
  • * What is the most scalable solution
  • * How the solution can be improved over time

This mindset allows me to think beyond code and contribute to larger business objectives.

## WHAT RECRUITERS CAN EXPECT

  • ✓ Learns fast
  • ✓ Takes initiative
  • ✓ Adapts quickly
  • ✓ Communicates effectively
  • ✓ Thinks analytically
  • ✓ Works collaboratively
  • ✓ Remains solution-focused under pressure
  • ✓ Continuously improves skills and knowledge

## CAREER VISION

My goal is to grow into a highly skilled Enterprise Solution Architect and Technology Leader capable of designing systems that solve meaningful business challenges at scale. I am excited by opportunities where I can contribute, learn, innovate, and create lasting impact.

DEPLOYMENT REGISTRY

Active Enterprise Solutions

Inspection of mission-critical systems deployed on SAP BTP and integrated with S/4HANA ERP instances.

DEPLOYMENT // 001

Smart College Management System

ONGOING DEPLOYMENT
Target Platform: SAP BTP Cloud Foundry
Architecture: SAP RAP RESTful
Data Protocol: OData V4 Service
BUSINESS PROBLEM

Educational institutions depend on fragmented legacy systems, leading to high administrative overhead, manual student tracking, and database inconsistency.

SOLUTION IMPLEMENTATION

Built a central management portal using SAP RAP. Designed Core Data Services (CDS Views) for student registers, and implemented behavior definitions with DCL security mapping role access.

TECHNICAL ARCHITECTURE STACK
01 SAP Fiori UI
Responsive Fiori Elements web layout for portal operations.
→
02 OData V4
Service definition exposed for CRUD transactions.
→
03 SAP RAP
Transactional framework executing business definitions.
→
04 CDS Views
Data models with semantic annotation layers.
→
05 SAP HANA
Physical database persistence for all entities.
Centralized Academic Database
-45% Admin Workload
DCL Secure Role Control
DEPLOYMENT // 002

Loan Eligibility & Approval System

ACTIVE DEPLOYMENT
Target Platform: SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Architecture: RAP Managed Scenario
Data Protocol: CDS Custom Query API
BUSINESS PROBLEM

Manual financial evaluations cause slow approval response times, human calculation errors, and lack of audit tracking in high-volume lending operations.

SOLUTION IMPLEMENTATION

Programmed a loan screening platform with automated determinations. Programmed RAP checks for credit scoring (CIBIL verify), salary thresholds, and occupation security guidelines.

TECHNICAL ARCHITECTURE STACK
01 SAP Fiori UI
Loan officer workspace dashboard.
→
02 OData V4
API gateway routing loan validation calls.
→
03 SAP RAP
Engine processing validations & business rules.
→
04 CDS Views
Financial score database projections.
→
05 SAP HANA
Secure persistence layer tracking approvals.
Automated Validation Checking
Real-time CIBIL Validation
Zero Calculation Errors

ROADMAP CONFIG

Professional Growth Roadmap

Timeline displaying academic benchmarks, enterprise project checkpoints, and future roadmap directions.

2022

Started Computer Science Engineering

Initiated algorithms, OOP, database design, and programming structures core courses.

2024

Began SAP Learning Journey

Self-directed study of SAP system architectures, Cloud foundry capabilities, and ABAP Cloud development paradigms.

2025

Completed SAP RAP Applications

Programmed the Loan Eligibility & Smart College systems, proving RAP managed database persistence capabilities.

2025

Earned SAP Associate Certification

Passed official exam validating professional ABAP Cloud development standards.

2026

Graduation & Opportunity Sync

Completing B.S. in CSE. Seeking technical roles as SAP Developer and enterprise cloud engineer.

* Future Horizon Roadmap

SAP Technical Consultant

Design and customize complex cloud integrations using OData APIs, RAP actions, and BTP middleware services.

SAP Solution Architect

Strategize global S/4HANA transitions, design decoupled architectures, and map business capabilities to Cloud solutions.

Enterprise Cloud Engineer

Optimize multi-cloud orchestrations, configure Cloud Connectors, and code high-throughput server back-ends.

Technology Entrepreneur

Build SaaS tools addressing enterprise process gaps and streamline business data exchanges.

Enterprise Project Spotlights

Smart College Management System

Managed RAP Scenario

A full-scale academic administration portal deployed on **SAP BTP Cloud Foundry** using the RESTful ABAP Programming (RAP) model.

BUSINESS NEED:

Fragmented university databases causing high administrative workloads and data conflicts.

RISHIK'S SOLUTION:

Modeled semantic data using CDS Entities and programmed behavior definitions with validation triggers. Configured secure role-based authorizations with DCL views.

BUSINESS IMPACT:

Centralized academic records, eliminated manual sync checks, and accelerated administrative workflows by **45%**.

ABAP Cloud SAP BTP CDS Views OData v4 SAP Fiori

Loan Eligibility & Approval System

Managed Transactional BO

Automated financial screening pipeline checking eligibility parameters against credit scoring logic on **SAP S/4HANA**.

BUSINESS NEED:

Slow, manual loan screening, calculation inconsistencies, and a lack of audit trails in high-volume lending.

RISHIK'S SOLUTION:

Programmed RAP determinations validating credit (CIBIL verify), occupation status, and income thresholds. Integrated service definitions exposed via OData.

BUSINESS IMPACT:

Automated calculations and enabled instant loan status screening, reducing calculation errors to zero.

RAP Engine S/4HANA Business Rules Determinations Fiori Elements

Key Accomplishments

🏆

Hackathon Winner

1st Place in National Level Engineering Hackathon for building resource scheduling algorithms.

🥈

Hackathon Runner-Up

2nd Place in Enterprise Technology Hackathon for data modeling and query optimizations.

📚

SAP Learning Journey Completed

Finished formal SAP training series: S4D400 (ABAP basics), S4D401 (ABAP OO), and S4D430 (ABAP RAP).

I am not just looking for a job — I am looking for challenging problems worth solving.

As a SAP Certified ABAP Cloud Developer, I am passionate about building scalable solutions, understanding business processes, and transforming complex requirements into efficient systems. What drives me is curiosity, continuous learning, and the satisfaction of solving real-world problems that create measurable impact.
